'''ây-m-z-m''' ('''kayamzemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:japa|japa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-m-z-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:japa|japa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-m-z-m
|-
! Lemma
| kayamzemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyamzemoko|thiyamzemoko]] || [[word:jiyamzemoko|jiyamzemoko]] || [[word:shiyamzemoko|shiyamzemoko]] || [[word:kiyamzemoko|kiyamzemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyamzemoko|thoyamzemoko]] || [[word:joyamzemoko|joyamzemoko]] || [[word:shoyamzemoko|shoyamzemoko]] || [[word:koyamzemoko|koyamzemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
